name: Web Design
description_en: A two-phase web visual-design skill: first produce a standardized DESIGN.md spec from your PRD / reference URL / screenshot / keywords, then generate UI/UX, visual, motion, and responsive web code that meets it.
description_zh: 两阶段的 Web 视觉设计技能:先从 PRD / 参考 URL / 截图 / 关键词产出标准化的 DESIGN.md 规范,确认后据此生成达标的 UI/UX、视觉、动效与响应式网页代码。
long_en: Specializes in web surfaces—landing pages, portfolios, product pages, blogs, personal sites, SaaS pages—gating code generation behind an agreed design spec.
long_zh: 专攻 web 端——落地页、作品集、产品页、博客、个人站、SaaS 介绍页——先定规范再出代码。
sec_note_en: Generates local web code and assets; review output before deploying.
sec_note_zh: 生成本地网页代码与素材;部署前请审阅产物。
